description: Daisy finally confronts Robbie Reyes, realizing his true identity as Ghost Rider. They engage in a violent fight, with Daisy attempting to hold her own using her quake powers despite the physical cost to herself. The encounter culminates when Robbie transforms, revealing his flaming skull and supernatural might. Overpowered and emotionally broken, Daisy begs Robbie to end her life, but he shows mercy and spares her.

transcript.line: Serial killers always complain when we try to intervene.
I only kill asesinos who deserve it. It's vengeance, chica.
For what? You killed a detective.
But he had blood on his hands.
You don't get to decide who deserves to die.
I'm not the one who decides.
Do it. I deserve it. Do it.
